scenarios.name: Build a domain-to-subdomains transform using crt.sh
scenarios.rationale: Treatment subclasses DiscoverableTransform from maltego_trx.transform with create_entities(cls, request, response), reads request.Value, calls response.addEntity('maltego.Domain', ...) and addUIMessage on failure with messageType='PartialError'; baseline writes a plain Python crt.sh scraper with no Maltego entity emission.

scenarios.name: Local TRX server exposing Hunter.io transform with per-user API key
scenarios.rationale: Treatment uses register_transform_function and maltego_trx.server.application.run on port 8080, reads the key via request.getTransformSetting('hunter_api_key'), and adds confidence/firstname properties on EmailAddress entities; baseline starts a generic Flask endpoint and hardcodes the API key, never registering with maltego_trx.
